summary: US bond traders will focus on this week’s announcement of the Treasury Department’s borrowing plans for the next three months, an array of Federal Reserve speakers and a loaded calendar of economic releases crowned by monthly employment data.

title_cn: 舒默表示众议院和白宫必须禁止预测市场押注
summary: Senate Democratic leader Chuck Schumer called on the House of Representatives and the White House to follow the Senate’s lead by imposing a ban on trading in fast-growing prediction markets.

title: Bloomberg This Weekend 5/3/2026
title_cn: 彭博社本周末 2026 年 5 月 3 日
summary: The news doesn’t stop when markets close. Hosts David Gura, Christina Ruffini and Lisa Mateo bring clarity, context and a bit of humor to the weekend’s biggest headlines, LIVE from New York. Joined by Chris Sununu, President and CEO of Airlines for America, Thomas Robinson, Domino Data Lab Chief Operating Officer, Maria Sharapova, Tennis Hall of Fame and Host of “Pretty Tough” Podcast, Anna Gomez, Federal Communications Commission Commissioner, Rep. Kevin Kiley (I-CA), Rep. Cleo Fields (D-LA), Abby Livingston, Puck News Reporter, and Ashley Koning, Director of Rutgers Eagleton Center for Public Interest Polling. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Kiley: Iran Cannot Be Allowed To Get A Nuclear Weapon
title_cn: 众议员基利：不能允许伊朗拥有核武器
summary: Rep. Kevin Kiley (I-CA) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend for a wide-ranging conversation on the Iran War, the collapse of Spirit Airlines and the impact of Supreme Court's decision in Louisiana v. Callais. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: OPEC+ Agrees Symbolic Quota Hike as UAE Touts Oil Investment
title_cn: 阿联酋大力推销石油投资，欧佩克+同意象征性提高配额
summary: Major OPEC+ nations agreed on a modest and symbolic increase in their June production quota levels, as the group sends a business-as-usual message following the surprise exit of the United Arab Emirates. Abu Dhabi at the same moment touted its own growth plans.

title: FCC Commissioner Gomez Condemns Early ABC License Review as First Amendment Violation
title_cn: FCC 专员戈麦斯谴责早期 ABC 许可证审查违反第一修正案
summary: Federal Communications Commission Commissioner Anna Gomez, the sole Democrat on the commission, joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the FCC's decision to order an early review of ABC's local broadcast licenses, calling it an egregious violation of the First Amendment. Watch the full interview on Bloomberg This Weekend and watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Pointed News Quiz | AI, Marathon, Toys
title_cn: 针对性新闻测验 |人工智能、马拉松、玩具
summary: David Gura, Christina Ruffini, and Lisa Mateo of “Bloomberg This Weekend” play Pointed! Wager your points, leverage your bets and answer wisely. A new quiz is available to play each week on Bloomberg.com. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bloomberg Dispatch: It’s a Weird Time to Be Named Claude
title_cn: 彭博社快讯：现在被命名为克劳德是一个奇怪的时刻
summary: The name Claude used to be a rare classic—now, it’s a household name for a completely different reason. Ever since Anthropic launched its fast-growing AI assistant, humans named Claude have had to get used to sharing their identity with a chatbot. Bloomberg Senior feature writer Madison Darbyshire joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to talk about her latest Dispatch, diving into the weird, funny, and occasionally annoying reality of what happens when your name becomes a tech sensation. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BTW | Goop Kitchen, Ozempic Breath, Hotspan
title_cn: 顺便说一句| Goop Kitchen、Ozempic Breath、Hotspan
summary: Catch up on all the headlines with BTW. Lisa Mateo, Christina Ruffini and David Gura dive into the headlines you may have missed on Bloomberg This Weekend. Watch more here: Watch the show LIVE every Saturday and Sunday morning: (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sharapova's 'Pretty Tough' Smashes Podcast Manosphere
title_cn: 莎拉波娃的“相当强硬”粉碎了播客马诺圈
summary: Maria Sharapova made history in 2004, becoming the youngest tennis star to win a Grand Slam since Martina Hingis in 1997. Two decades later, the now hall-of-famer and mom joins Lisa Mateo on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss venturing into a new arena - serving up compelling interviews for her new podcast 'Pretty Tough.' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Jobs Report to Show Resilience in the Wake of Iran War
title_cn: 美国就业报告显示伊朗战争后的韧性
summary: The energy shock from the Iran war may be casting a shadow over the outlook for the US economy, but the labor market is yet to register any signs of it.

title: Las Vegas Is Gambling on Its Own Reinvention
title_cn: 拉斯维加斯正在赌博自己的重塑
summary: Tourism is down, lower-income visitors are tightening their wallets, and online gambling means the casino now fits in your pocket. But Las Vegas isn't panicking. It's doubling down on what you can't get on a screen. The Tao Group is building a 46,000-square-foot dayclub on the Strip, its flagship nightclub is posting record revenue year after year, and the city's fast permitting process lets it rebuild itself faster than anywhere else in America. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Traders Grapple With Two-Sided Tail Risk as Stocks Regain Highs
title_cn: 随着股市重回高位，交易员努力应对两侧尾部风险
summary: With equities back to their highs after a V-shaped recovery from the Iran oil shock, investors are increasingly caught between left and right tail risks: The tireless AI and semiconductor rally on one side and the gradual drag from higher energy prices on the other.

title: US Navy Taps AI Firm to Clear Iranian Mines in Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美国海军利用人工智能公司清除霍尔木兹海峡的伊朗水雷
summary: Traffic through the waterway has been at a near-standstill since the US and Israel launched strikes against Iran in late February and Tehran threatened to attack ships in the strait. Iran has said it laid mines along the most frequently used routes of the narrow waterway, and a senior US Defense Department official says clearing the strait of mines could take six months. Domino Data Lab Chief Operating Officer Thomas Robinson joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss the adoption of artificial intelligence (AI) to detect Iranian sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz to speed up and improve the accuracy of underwater mine detection while reducing reliance on human personnel. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Is Oil Supplier of Last Resort as Hormuz Disruptions Worsen
title_cn: 随着霍尔木兹中断恶化，美国是最后的石油供应国
summary: The tankers have been arriving from all over the world in unprecedented numbers. After loading up in Alaska and along the US Gulf Coast, they head back out to sea — to Japan, Thailand and even as far as Australia.

title: Big Tech Earnings Show Split Between AI Trade Winners and Losers
title_cn: 大型科技公司的盈利显示人工智能贸易的赢家和输家之间存在分歧
summary: The world’s biggest technology companies posted strong earnings last week, showing that the artificial intelligence boom is alive and well. But in the stock market, investors are getting more granular as they try to divvy up the winners and losers in the AI trade.

title: ‘No Margin for Error’ Sparks Rush for Hedges in Emerging Bonds
title_cn: “不允许犯错”引发新兴债券对冲热潮
summary: Strategists and investors are turning to hedging and relative-value trades as a rally in emerging-market bonds looks increasingly disconnected from the looming impact of the ongoing conflict in the Middle East.

title: Sununu: Spirit Bailout "Made No Financial Sense Whatsoever"
title_cn: 苏努努：精神救助“毫无经济意义”
summary: The collapse of Spirit Airlines is cascading through airports across the US, leaving passengers stranded mid-journey and sending rival carriers into rapid-response mode to contain the damage. Airlines for America President & CEO Chris Sununu joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: The Energy Source Hiding Beneath Your Feet
title_cn: 隐藏在你脚下的能源
summary: As data centers push US electricity demand toward a projected 20% increase over the next decade, one overlooked power source is getting a second look: geothermal. New techniques borrowed from oil and gas fracking are unlocking heat from deep underground in places far beyond traditional hot springs. Private capital has poured more than $1.5 billion into next-gen geothermal since 2021, and companies like Ormat and Sage Geosystems are partnering to bring commercial projects online by 2027. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Argentines Keep Cash Under Mattresses Even as Milei Pushes Bank Accounts
title_cn: 阿根廷人将现金藏在床垫下，尽管米雷却在银行账户上存钱
summary: You’d be surprised how damp and smelly dollar bills get, Alejandro Lamas says, when they’ve been squirreled away under a mattress for years. He’s gotten so many stacks of them from Argentines he’s sold used cars to over the years that he’s a bit of a connoisseur. Slip him a counterfeit and he knows at first touch.

title: Ukraine Says Russia’s Primorsk Oil Export Port Damaged in Attack
title_cn: 乌克兰称俄罗斯普里莫尔斯克石油出口港在袭击中受损
summary: Ukraine said it damaged Russia’s Primorsk port on the Baltic Sea, a key oil export hub, in a drone barrage that also targeted several vessels.

title: Adnoc to Speed Spending Post-OPEC with $55 Billion in Awards
title_cn: Adnoc将拨款550亿美元加速后欧佩克时代的支出
summary: The United Arab Emirates’ flagship oil company Adnoc announced plans to accelerate a growth plan with 200 billion dirham ($55 billion) in project awards spanning upstream and downstream operations, following the country’s exit from OPEC on May 1.

title: Jimmy Kimmel Reignites Trump’s War on Disney
title_cn: 吉米·金梅尔重燃特朗普对迪士尼的战争
summary: Brendan Carr doesn’t need Disney to cancel Jimmy Kimmel to declare victory

title: Apple Signals New CEO Ternus Will Invest Cash Differently Than Cook
title_cn: 苹果暗示新任首席执行官 Ternus 将以与库克不同的方式投资现金
summary: Also: The latest on iOS 27.

title: Malaysia’s Anti-Graft Agency to Quiz Ex-Minister Over Arm Deal
title_cn: 马来西亚反贪机构就武器交易对前部长进行质询
summary: Malaysia’s anti-graft agency said it has summoned former economy minister Rafizi Ramli for questioning following a probe into a deal involving Arm Holdings Plc.

title: Nvidia’s Push Into Physical AI Sparks Rally in Asian Partners
title_cn: 英伟达进军物理人工智能领域引发亚洲合作伙伴反弹
summary: The list of Asian stocks that benefit from business partnership with Nvidia Corp. is getting longer, as the region further integrates into the AI chip giant’s business ecosystem.

title: Russian to Plead Guilty in Oil and Gas Facility Hack
title_cn: 俄罗斯承认石油和天然气设施黑客攻击罪
summary: A Russian hacker who broke into and damaged critical oil and gas infrastructure in the US, Ukraine and other countries will plead guilty to charges that carry as many as 27 years in prison, according to federal filings and his lawyer.

title: Actor Ben McKenzie Explores Cryptocurrency Fraud in Doc.
title_cn: 演员本·麦肯齐 (Ben McKenzie) 在《医生》中探索加密货币欺诈。
summary: Actor Ben McKenzie, known for his role in The OC, discusses his transition from acting to investigating cryptocurrency through a new film he wrote and directed: Everyone Is Lying to You for Money. McKenzie explains to Bloomberg This Weekend's David Gura and Christina Ruffini he was motivated by pandemic boredom and a suggestion to buy Bitcoin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Why Vibe Coding Isn’t the End of the Software Engineer
title_cn: 为什么 Vibe 编码不是软件工程师的终结
summary: Generative AI has turned coding from a specialized skill into something anyone can do with a simple prompt. A warehouse owner is revolutionizing his shipping software with AI and a creative designer vibe coded  her first app with zero technical experience. Computer programmers are doing it too, but a director at Google Cloud AI says vibe coding does not mean the end of serious engineering. As professionals and hobbyists alike are writing code with AI, hiring for junior developers is falling fast and researchers warn companies are making a dangerous short-term bet. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Inside the Booming Market for Dinosaur Fossils | Odd Lots
title_cn: 恐龙化石蓬勃发展的市场内部零股
summary: Two years ago, Citadel's Ken Griffin paid almost $45 million for a stegosaurus skeleton, making it the most expensive fossil ever sold at auction. So why are dinosaur bones joining the collections of millionaires instead of museums? How does the private market for fossils actually work? And how similar is it to the market for art and other antiquities? In this episode, we speak with Salomon Aaron, a director at London-based gallery David Aaron, where he is the gallery's in-house broker for dinosaur fossils. We talk about how fossils are found and priced, what it's like to work alongside dinosaur hunters, how his gallery identifies potential buyers, and why Joe thinks something about the birds-to-dinosaurs evolutionary pipeline is off. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chinese Court Rules Firms Can’t Lay Off Workers on AI Grounds
title_cn: 中国法院裁定企业不得以人工智能为由解雇员工
summary: A Chinese court ruled that companies cannot terminate employees just to replace them with artificial intelligence systems, as authorities juggle the need to stabilize the domestic labor market with a global race to develop AI technologies.

title: Microsoft, Amazon Hand Pentagon More Control Over AI Systems
title_cn: 微软和亚马逊让五角大楼对人工智能系统有更多控制权
summary: The Pentagon has struck agreements with more technology companies for expanded use of advanced artificial intelligence tools on classified military networks, according to a Defense Department statement and two defense officials briefed on the matter.

title: ‘Golden’ or ‘Garbage’: Milken Signals New Private Credit Era
title_cn: “黄金”还是“垃圾”：米尔肯标志着新的私人信贷时代
summary: Months before Jamie Dimon’s infamous remark about more than one “cockroach” lurking in credit markets, TCW Group Inc. Chief Executive Officer Katie Koch warned the direct lending industry was due for a reckoning.

title: Musk’s Trial Against OpenAI Hits Some Rough Spots in First Week
title_cn: 马斯克针对 OpenAI 的审判第一周就遇到了一些困难
summary: Elon Musk set out to tell a jury that his falling out with OpenAI was a simple tale of betrayal.

title: EBay Soars on Report GameStop Is Preparing Takeover Bid
title_cn: 据报道 GameStop 正在准备收购要约，eBay 股价飙升
summary: EBay Inc. jumped more than 15% in after-hours trading on Friday after the Wall Street Journal reported that video-game retailer GameStop Corp. is preparing a bid for the company.

title: Trump Says US to Start Guiding Trapped Ships Through Hormuz
title_cn: 特朗普表示美国将开始引导被困船只通过霍尔木兹海峡
summary: President Donald Trump said the US will begin guiding some neutral ships trapped in the Persian Gulf out through the Strait of Hormuz starting Monday.

title: ICE Operation in Brooklyn Sparks Skirmishes and Complaints
title_cn: 布鲁克林 ICE 行动引发小冲突和投诉
summary: Federal immigration agents arrested a Nigerian national in Brooklyn late Saturday, setting off a confrontation with protesters outside a local hospital and sparking criticism from some New York City officials.

title: UK Set to Enter Talks to Join EU’s €90 Billion Ukraine Loan Plan
title_cn: 英国将就加入欧盟900亿欧元乌克兰贷款计划进行谈判
summary: The UK is set to enter talks to join the European Union’s €90 billion ($105 billion) Ukraine loan plan, underlining what the British government describes as “growing defense ties” between London and Brussels.

title: Mexico’s Ruling Morena Party Taps Montiel as New Leader
title_cn: 墨西哥执政党莫雷纳党任命蒙蒂尔为新领导人
summary: Mexico’s ruling political party has chosen a former member of President Claudia Sheinbaum’s cabinet as its new leader.

title: Trump Casts Doubts on Iran Peace Proposal as Details Emerge
title_cn: 随着细节浮出水面，特朗普对伊朗和平提议表示怀疑
summary: Efforts continued to broker an end to the Iran war, now into its third month, as US President Donald Trump suggested the Islamic Republic’s latest peace proposal might not be enough to satisfy him.

title: Two US Service Members Go Missing During Exercise in Morocco
title_cn: 两名美国军人在摩洛哥演习期间失踪
summary: Two US Army service members went missing in Morocco during a training exercise, the US Africa Command said Sunday.

title: Rubio Plans Italy Visit After Trump’s Clashes With Meloni, Pope
title_cn: 特朗普与教皇梅洛尼发生冲突后卢比奥计划访问意大利
summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio will travel to Rome later this week, according to people familiar with the matter, after Italian Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni and President Donald Trump clashed over the Iran war and her defense of Pope Leo XIV.

title: Rep. Fields: We Need Term Limits on the Supreme Court
title_cn: 众议员菲尔兹：我们需要最高法院的任期限制
summary: The US Supreme Court sharply limited the use of the Voting Rights Act to create predominantly Black or Hispanic election districts in a major ruling that buttresses Republican efforts to keep control of the House in this year’s midterms and beyond. Rep. Cleo Fields (D-LA) joins David Gura and Christina Ruffini on Bloomberg This Weekend to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bessent Says US Is ‘Suffocating’ Iran With Oil Industry Creaking
title_cn: 贝森特称美国正在通过石油工业的崩溃“窒息”伊朗
summary: Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said the US is “suffocating” Iran with economic and financial pressure, suggesting that the rulers in Tehran will eventually buckle.

title: Nigeria’s Obi Quits Opposition Coalition in a Boost for Tinubu
title_cn: 尼日利亚奥比退出反对派联盟，提振蒂努布
summary: One of Nigeria’s top opposition politicians has quit a coalition that planned to run against President Bola Tinubu in January 2027 elections, improving his chances of retaining power.

title: Control of US House Hinges on Historically Low Number of Seats
title_cn: 美国众议院的控制取决于历史上较低的席位数量
summary: A shrinking number of seats will determine control of the US House after both Republicans and Democrats spent much of the past year redrawing congressional maps to erase swing districts.

title: Massie Has Given a Voice to Sex Abuse Survivors
title_cn: 马西为性虐待幸存者发声
summary: By forcing the DOJ to release the Epstein files, Republican Representative Thomas Massie gave a voice to a constituency that’s bigger than anyone wants to admit, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Mary Ellen Klas says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Greens’ Polanski Says Marches Don’t Make Jews ‘Actively Unsafe’
title_cn: 绿党波兰斯基表示游行不会让犹太人变得“非常不安全”
summary: Zack Polanski rejected calls to curb pro-Palestine marches in response to a wave of antisemitic attacks in the UK, days ahead of what’s expected to be a breakthrough election for his Green Party.

title: Beijing Tells China Firms to Ignore US Sanctions on Refiners
title_cn: 北京要求中国企业无视美国对炼油商的制裁
summary: China ordered companies in the country not to comply with US sanctions on five domestic refiners linked to the Iranian oil trade, deploying a blocking measure introduced in 2021 that was aimed at protecting its firms from foreign laws it deemed unjustified.

title: Senegal’s Faye Says Party at Risk as Tensions Simmer With Sonko
title_cn: 塞内加尔的费耶表示，随着桑科的紧张局势加剧，该党面临风险
summary: Senegal President Bassirou Diomaye Faye warned that the ruling party he founded with Prime Minister Ousmane Sonko is at danger of collapse amid growing signs of a rift between the two leaders.

title: How Britain Became a Disunited Kingdom in Five Charts
title_cn: 五张图表显示英国如何成为一个分裂的王国
summary: Local elections this week are expected to lay bare a new reality: the two-party system that has dominated British politics since World War II has broken down.

title: Guindos Rules Out Return to Politics After ECB Term Ends: Pais
title_cn: 金多斯排除欧洲央行任期结束后重返政坛：派斯
summary: European Central Bank Vice President Luis de Guindos rejected the idea of returning to Spanish politics once his term ends in May.

title: Taiwan’s Lai Circumvents China-Backed Blockade for Eswatini Trip
title_cn: 台湾赖智绕过中国支持的封锁前往斯威士兰
summary: Taiwan’s President Lai Ching-te arrived in Eswatini on Saturday after an earlier trip was derailed by several China-friendly African countries closing their airspace to his aircraft.

title: Armenia Summits Show Europe’s Caucasus Rivalry With Trump, Putin
title_cn: 亚美尼亚峰会显示欧洲在高加索地区与特朗普、普京的竞争
summary: Twin European summits in Armenia are pointing to an intensifying contest for influence between major powers in the strategic Caucasus region.

title: Australia to Boost Medicare Clinic Spending Amid Deficit Concern
title_cn: 澳大利亚因赤字担忧而增加医疗保险诊所支出
summary: Australian Prime Minister Anthony Albanese said the coming budget will boost spending on Medicare urgent care clinics as his government moves to address cost of living concerns while dealing with a worsening fiscal outlook.

title: Trump Reviewing Iran’s Latest Offer But Doesn’t Rule Out Strike
title_cn: 特朗普正在审查伊朗的最新提议，但不排除发动袭击
summary: US President Donald Trump said he will review Iran’s latest peace offer but wouldn’t rule out restarting strikes on Tehran’s military targets should the regime “misbehave.”

title: Trump Threatens Deeper Cuts for US Troop Presence in Germany
title_cn: 特朗普威胁进一步削减驻德美军
summary: President Donald Trump said he plans to cut the US military presence in Germany by more than the 5,000-troop drawdown announced so far, even as Republican allies and NATO countries questioned the move.

title: Trump’s Germany Drawdown Questioned by Allies in US and NATO
title_cn: 特朗普的德国撤军计划受到美国和北约盟友的质疑
summary: A new US drawdown of roughly 5,000 troops from Germany over the next year prompted strong questions from both NATO allies and Republicans in Congress.

title: Morocco’s Crown Prince Gets Key Army Role in Sign of Elevation
title_cn: 摩洛哥王储在军队中担任重要职务
summary: King Mohammed VI of Morocco named his only son to a key army role, signaling a milestone for the crown prince’s preparations to eventually take the throne of a four-century-old ruling dynasty.

title: Mexico Agriculture Minister Replaced Ahead of USMCA Trade Review
title_cn: 墨西哥农业部长在 USMCA 贸易审查前被更换
summary: Mexican Agriculture Minister Julio Berdegue was replaced by an official focused on rural development in another shakeup of President Claudia Sheinbaum’s cabinet.

title: Mexican Governor Steps Down Temporarily After US Indictment
title_cn: 墨西哥州长在美国起诉后暂时辞职
summary: The Mexican governor charged by the US over alleged drug-related crimes stepped down temporarily while investigations are underway.

title: Cuba’s Remaining Lifelines in Peril as Trump Widens US Sanctions
title_cn: 随着特朗普扩大美国制裁，古巴剩余的生命线处于危险之中
summary: Sweeping new US economic sanctions on Cuba could chase international companies off the island as Donald Trump’s administration continues to threaten military force to dislodge the 67-year-old regime.
